articles.title: Caste Violence and Erotic Model Deaths Discussed
articles.body:
Anon called for violence against low castes, listing methods including beheading, acid, and meat grinding. The posts sparked varied responses, though not detailed here.

Anon also discussed the deaths of erotic models, including a 24-year-old Onlyfans and PornHub model from Italy who died during a livestream.

Additionally, an incel asked for advice on transforming into a 'Chad' in two months. Anon insulted Buddhists, calling them 'dumb' and atheist.

Others discussed Indians' views on Pakistan's existence, with one suggesting Indian patriotism would decline if Pakistan vanished. One aside: The sheer brutality of some posts is disturbing.

articles.title: Anon Calls for Violence Against Low Castes, Sparking Varied Responses
articles.body:
Anon opened the thread with a post calling for violent actions against low castes, including killing, beheading, and mutilating them. The original poster listed several brutal methods, setting a violent tone for the discussion.

Anon responded with a claim that low castes are a reason for India's poverty and for racism against Indians abroad. This poster argued that low castes, along with poor Indians and scammers, are giving India a bad reputation.

Another anon proposed that allowing low castes to use upper caste (UC) surnames could lead to low castes committing crimes and then blaming upper castes for their actions. This poster mentioned specific cases where such scenarios allegedly played out.

A respondent brought up a case of a dalit man accused of raping a five-year-old, noting that the man's name was linked to Bhimta Rao, a figure associated with Dalit rights.

This poster claimed that the dalit man's own community and supporters abandoned him once he was caught. Anon countered with a remark about various minorities contributing to India in different fields, suggesting that low castes have not made similar contributions.

This poster mentioned Sikhs in the army, Northeastern people in football, and Muslims in fields like science and cuisine.

In a different direction, an anon discussed reservations for OBC and SC/ST groups, calling those who use them 'dysgenic.' This poster seemed to lament the practice, associating it with negative outcomes.

Yet another anon reflected on the formation of OBC and its impact on social dynamics, mentioning that the creation of OBC was something that higher castes were not initially against, but it ended up comprising individuals from fallen Dwijas and mutts.

A respondent mused about siding with less 'retarded and less dysgenic' individuals within the low caste group if lineage is taken away from Hinduism. This poster seemed to grapple with the implications of defending certain groups.

Finally, an anon brought up epigenetics, suggesting that the issues within the dalit community, such as child rape and high rates of retardation and inbreeding, are natural outcomes over generations of certain behaviors being defended and mixed into the community.

articles.title: Erotic model deaths reported in livestreams
articles.body:
Anon described a 24-year-old gay erotic model who died during a livestream in Italy. The model was streaming with a radio news station playing in the background, discussing the latest COVID-19 news.

Anon provided another case of a 24-year-old man who intentionally caused the death of his 28-year-old gay partner, citing a German Forensic Medicine textbook.

Another anon shared a case of a 23-year-old woman who died while engaging in erotic asphyxiation with her partner. The partner had waited too long, leaving her hanging for a minute while he masturbated.

Anon also mentioned an 18-year-old man streaming on an erotic platform who died after a viewer requested he masturbate while hanging himself. The viewer suggested using a bed sheet. There was debate among responders about the intentions behind one such livestream.

Some questioned whether the streamer wanted to make his death stand out by masturbating as he died, while others thought it might have been an accidental death. Anon noted that some people get aroused by imagining being killed by hanging or strangulation.

The brain deprived of blood can create a hallucinogenic effect, adding to the arousal. One responder shared a personal experience, stating that while they had been watching gore videos since age 13, hanging videos made them uncomfortable, evoking a visceral reaction.

articles.title: Incel to Chad Transformation Advice
articles.body:
Anon asked how to achieve an 'Incel to Chad transformation in 2 months.' One anon responded with a personal anecdote, sharing that they and their partner lost their virginity to each other at 25 and 26, and were now trying to avoid getting her pregnant.

Another anon advised the original poster to stop using labels like 'randis' and instead think of promiscuous women as simply that, which they believed would enhance their chances of success.

A different approach was suggested by an anon who recommended getting a vasectomy, stating it wasn't worth having a child in the current economy.

One respondent provided a straightforward answer, telling the OP to 'just do it,' and listing actions such as going to the gym, eating protein, sleeping, growing a beard, getting a haircut, and stopping habits like fap and whining.

Other anons engaged in a side conversation about underwear, with one explaining the difference between thongs and G-strings.

Another exchange involved an anon being called 'fagyush' and 'confirmed' as such, with the accused responding with 'kek faggot, you are wrong' and arguing about censorship on the site.

articles.title: Anon Calls Buddhists 'Dumb', Atheist
articles.body:
Anon posted that Buddhists are 'dumb' and 'straight up atheist'. They claimed Buddhism made 90% of North Indians 'Vegan and subhuman'.

Another anon replied that Buddhism emerged from one person, turned the subcontinent vegan, and was later co-opted by non-Indians.

A respondent stated that actual Buddhist scholars do not recognise Ambedkarite Buddhism as legitimate, calling it a 'political ideology with Buddhist flavour'. Anon also claimed Hinduism is superior, citing its acceptance of alcohol and weed.

articles.title: Indians on Pakistan's Existence
articles.body:
Anon posted that if Pakistan vanishes, Indian patriotic zeal will plummet. Anon responded, suggesting Indians don't obsess over Pakistan and have better things to think about. Another anon disagreed, citing religious differences and the idea that coexistence is not possible with Islam.

Anon claimed low-caste Indians and Pakistanis are powerless and harmful. Others discussed the role of Islam and low castes in Indian and Pakistani societies, with some calling for stricter controls on low castes.

Anon mused that Pakistan's existence may be the only thing keeping Indian nationalism intact.
